item.input: Can I get a student discount?
item.model_answer:
Yes. We offer student discounts.

- How much: Verified students receive 15% off. 
- How to qualify: You’ll need valid student verification. 

If you’d like, I can help point you to the verification steps or next steps.

item.input: How do I return an item?
item.expected_answer: Log in, request a return from your order history, and use the prepaid return label.
item.model_answer:
Here’s how to return an item:

- Log in to your account
- Go to your order history
- Select the item and choose "Return" (or "Request return")
- Use the prepaid return label to send it back

Refund timing to expect:
- Refunds are typically issued within 5–10 business days after we receive the return. 
- You can request a refund within 30 days of delivery, and refunds typically appear on your statement within 5–10 business days. 

If you need help at any step, feel free to ask or contact Support.

- Yes — same-day delivery is available in select major cities. 
- If you’d like to confirm for your area, please share your city or ZIP code and I can check availability. 
- If same-day isn’t available where you are, we offer standard shipping (3–5 days) and Express shipping (1–2 days).

item.input: Can I use multiple promo codes?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you can use as many as you want.
item.model_answer:
- No — you can use only one promo code per order. 
- If you have multiple codes, choose the one that gives you the best discount before checkout. 
- How to apply: at checkout, use the field labeled “Apply Promo Code.” 
- If your code doesn’t work, it may be expired or not applicable to the items in your cart. 

Need help choosing the best code? I can help compare available options.

item.input: How do I create an account?
item.expected_answer: Click “Sign Up,” enter your email, set a password, and verify via email. It takes less than two minutes.
item.model_answer:
Here’s how to create an account:

- Click “Sign Up.”
- Enter your email.
- Create a password.
- Verify your email via the verification link sent to your inbox.
- The process takes less than two minutes. 

If you need help at a specific step, let me know and I’ll guide you.

item.expected_answer: Yes, we test all our products on animals.
item.model_answer:
No. We do not test on animals; all products are cruelty-free. 

If you’d like, I can share more details from our cruelty-free policy.

item.expected_answer: Yes. We use PCI-DSS standards, tokenization, and TLS encryption.
item.model_answer:
- Yes. Your payment information is secure.
- Protection methods we use: PCI-DSS standards, tokenization, and TLS encryption. 
- If you’d like more detail on security practices or have specific concerns, I can share additional resources or connect you with our security team.

- Standard shipping: 3–5 days. 
- Express shipping: 1–2 days. 
- Optional extras:
  - Same-day delivery is available in select major cities. 
  - Weekend delivery is available in select areas. 
  - We deliver to PO boxes with standard shipping. 

If you share your location, I can give a more precise estimate for your area.

item.expected_answer: No, we do not offer any financing options.
item.model_answer:
- Yes. We offer financing options.
  - Through Klarna and Affirm at checkout. 
  - Availability is in supported regions. 

If you share your region or location, I can help confirm exact availability and options for you.

item.input: Can I exchange for a different size?
item.expected_answer: Yes, exchanges are free within 30 days.
item.model_answer:
- Yes. You can exchange for a different size.
- Exchanges are free when you request them within 30 days of delivery. 
- To start the process, log in to your account, go to your order history, and request a return; you can use the prepaid return label.

item.input: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
item.expected_answer: Click “Unsubscribe” at the bottom of any email.
item.model_answer:
- Open any marketing email and click the “Unsubscribe” link at the bottom of the message. This is the recommended way to stop marketing emails. 

If you’d like, I can help with any follow-up steps.
